textEn: Woe to those who give less [than due],

textAr: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
textEn: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.
But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.
textTranslit: Wa izaa kaaloohum aw wazanoohum yukhsiroon

textEn: Do they not think that they will be resurrected
For a tremendous Day -
The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds?

textAr: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ
textEn: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.
textTranslit: Kallaaa inna kitaabal fujjaari lafee Sijjeen

textEn: And what can make you know what is sijjeen?
It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.
Woe, that Day, to the deniers,
Who deny the Day of Recompense.

textAr: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
textEn: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.
textTranslit: Wa maa yukazzibu biheee illaa kullu mu'tadin aseem

textAr: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
textEn: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
textTranslit: Izaa tutlaa'alaihi aayaatunaa qaala asaateerul awwaleen

textAr: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
textEn: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.
textTranslit: Kallaa bal raana 'alaa quloobihim maa kaanoo yaksiboon

textAr: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
textEn: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.
textTranslit: Kallaaa innahum 'ar Rabbihim yawma'izil lamah jooboon

textEn: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.

textAr: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
textEn: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."
textTranslit: Summa yuqaalu haazal lazee kuntum bihee tukazziboon

textAr: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
textEn: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in ʿilliyyūn.
And what can make you know what is ʿilliyyūn?
It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed
Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allāh].
Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure
On adorned couches, observing.
You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.
They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.

textAr: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ
textEn: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.
textTranslit: Khitaamuhoo misk; wa fee zaalika falyatanaafasil Mutanaafisoon

textEn: And its mixture is of Tasneem,
A spring from which those near [to Allāh] drink.

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
textEn: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
textTranslit: Innal lazeena ajramoo kaanoo minal lazeena aamanoo yadhakoon

textEn: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances.

textAr: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ
textEn: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting.
textTranslit: Wa izan qalabooo ilaaa ahlihimun qalaboo fakiheen

textAr: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
textEn: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost."
textTranslit: Wa izaa ra awhum qaalooo inna haaa'ulaaa'i ladaaal loon

textEn: But they had not been sent as guardians over them.

textAr: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
textEn: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers,
textTranslit: Fal yawmal lazeena aamanoo minal kuffaari yadhakoon

textEn: On adorned couches, observing.

textAr: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
textEn: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do?
textTranslit: Hal suwwibal kuffaaru maa kaanoo yaf'aloon
